skilled.metaTitle: New Zealand skilled work & residence pathways | MinRosh
skilled.metaDescription: Skilled work and residence planning for New Zealand: accredited employer work visas, skills, and pathway sequencing. Verify requirements on Immigration New Zealand.
skilled.headline: New Zealand skilled work and residence planning
skilled.intro: New Zealand’s work and residence system includes several visa categories with different job offers, skill thresholds, and residence tracks. Employers, accreditation, and labour market tests can all matter depending on the pathway. Use Immigration New Zealand’s find-a-visa tool for authoritative eligibility, and MinRosh for structured planning around your timeline.

officialResources.label: Immigration New Zealand — find a visa

sections.title: Clarifying your goal
sections.body: We start with whether you are aiming for temporary skilled work, a longer residence pathway, or a mix. Your job offer, occupation, and credentials drive which visas are realistic.
bullets: Job offer and employer accreditation context
Health, character, and English expectations for your category

sections.title: Documentation and timing
sections.body: NZ applications often need tight alignment between employment agreements, role descriptions, and your background. Early document planning reduces rework when INZ requests clarification.

faq.question: Do I need a job offer for every NZ work visa?
faq.answer: Many skilled categories require an offer or employer involvement, but the exact rule depends on the visa type. Check the official visa page for the category you are considering.

partner.metaTitle: New Zealand partner & family visas | MinRosh
partner.metaDescription: Partner and dependent pathways for New Zealand: relationship evidence and sponsorship context. Confirm criteria on Immigration New Zealand.
partner.headline: New Zealand partner and family visas
partner.intro: Partner-based categories require credible evidence of a genuine relationship and may involve health and character requirements for both partners. Requirements differ by visa type; always read the official INZ instructions for the visa you intend to apply for.

officialResources.label: Immigration New Zealand — find a visa

sections.title: Evidence themes
sections.body: Similar to other countries, decision-makers look for consistency across finances, living together, social recognition, and commitment. We help you organise a coherent narrative and document set.

student.metaTitle: New Zealand student visa planning | study in NZ | MinRosh
student.metaDescription: Student visa guidance for New Zealand: enrolment, funds, and genuine study intent. Official requirements on Immigration New Zealand.
student.headline: Study in New Zealand — visa planning
student.intro: A New Zealand student visa ties you to an approved programme and provider. You must meet funds, health, and character rules and show a genuine intention to study. If you later consider work or residence, plan early so course choice does not conflict with longer-term goals.

officialResources.label: Immigration New Zealand — find a visa

sections.title: Provider and programme fit
sections.body: We help you think through how your offer of place, fees, and living costs come together in an application-ready picture.

education.metaTitle: New Zealand education consultation | courses & visas | MinRosh
education.metaDescription: Course and institution planning for New Zealand with visa awareness: offers of place, costs, and student visa alignment.
education.headline: Education planning for New Zealand
education.intro: Choosing a programme and provider affects both your student visa story and your experience abroad. MinRosh helps you shortlist options with an eye on credibility, costs, and how the plan reads to Immigration New Zealand.

officialResources.label: Immigration New Zealand — find a visa

sections.title: From course choice to visa prep
sections.body: Once you hold a credible offer of place, we align timelines with English tests, funds evidence, and any dependants included in your plan.

updates.metaTitle: New Zealand immigration updates | INZ news | MinRosh
updates.metaDescription: Tracking Immigration New Zealand policy and fee changes. Use official INZ sources and MinRosh for tailored interpretation.
updates.headline: New Zealand immigration updates
updates.intro: INZ adjusts fees, instructions, and sometimes pathways over time. Rely on immigration.govt.nz announcements for authoritative detail. MinRosh helps clients interpret what a change might mean for their specific stage.

officialResources.label: Immigration New Zealand — find a visa

sections.title: What to monitor
sections.body: Watch visa instruction updates, median wage references where applicable, and accreditation rules if you depend on employer-backed categories.

faq.metaTitle: New Zealand visa FAQ | MinRosh Migration
faq.metaDescription: Common questions about New Zealand visas and how MinRosh supports NZ-bound clients from Australia.
faq.headline: New Zealand visa questions
faq.intro: These notes are general. Always confirm eligibility on Immigration New Zealand before making decisions.

officialResources.label: Immigration New Zealand — find a visa

faq.question: Can MinRosh help if I am not in Australia?
faq.answer: Many clients work with us remotely. Contact us with your country of residence and goal so we can suggest the right next step.

faq.question: Where do I find official NZ visa fees?
faq.answer: Fees and charges are published by Immigration New Zealand on the relevant visa pages and fee schedules.

about.metaTitle: MinRosh & New Zealand pathways | migration guidance
about.metaDescription: How MinRosh Migration supports New Zealand visa planning alongside Australian practice.
about.headline: MinRosh and New Zealand migration
about.intro: MinRosh is Brisbane-based with strong Australian visa depth, and we also support clients exploring New Zealand study, work, and residence routes with structured planning and official-source discipline.

officialResources.label: Immigration New Zealand — find a visa

sections.title: How we help
sections.body: We focus on sequencing, document clarity, and honest fit checks rather than promising outcomes INZ cannot guarantee.

contact.metaTitle: Contact MinRosh | New Zealand visa enquiry
contact.metaDescription: Enquire about New Zealand visas with MinRosh Migration: phone, email, WhatsApp, and consultation booking.
contact.headline: Contact us about New Zealand
contact.intro: Tell us whether you are focused on study, skilled work, partnership, or residence, and your target timeframe. We will suggest the clearest next step and relevant official pages to read in parallel.

officialResources.label: Immigration New Zealand — find a visa

sections.title: Reach MinRosh
sections.body: Use the main contact page for the enquiry form, or book a consultation directly. Mention New Zealand in your message so we route you efficiently.
